title: Live GitHub repo creation succeeded only through the full gate chain
lesson: The first live GitHub repository creation on 2026-07-03 worked only after every gate passed in order: a scoped approval lock (approval-20260703-github-repo-create), a passing boot check, passing local foundation validation, audit events for approval and execution, and a recorded connector execution result. The execution stopped before any deploy, domain, or workflow action. Future live connector actions should reuse this exact gate chain rather than inventing a new path.
notes: Candidate only. Not accepted permanent truth until reviewed and promoted per docs/memory-learning-policy.md.
